reason: production-api-client-switch PAC-R0 intake: net-new backend schema requirement, queued for PO sign-off before PAC-R1 applies schema.sql

node.statement: The application persists all 12 Api* domain entities in a real Supabase Postgres schema (17 tables, 6 enums) matching the frozen backend-discovery-v3 dataset, replacing the in-memory/localStorage mock store.
